title: Symbiosis SET Cut Off 2026

detail.title: Symbiosis SET Cut Off 2026
detail.short_info: Symbiosis SET Cut Off 2026 will be released after the results on 20 May. Check institute-wise expected cutoff for BBA, BBA IT, BCA at SCMS Pune, Noida, Bengaluru & more. Direct scorecard link available.

content.text: Symbiosis SET Cut Off 2026 will be released by individual institutes shortly after the SET Result declaration on 20 May 2026. Candidates will be able to check institute-wise cutoffs for BBA, BBA (IT), BCA, and other UG programmes.

Symbiosis International (Deemed University) conducts the Symbiosis Entrance Test (SET) for admission to various undergraduate programmes across its campuses. The SET Cut Off 2026 is the minimum score required to qualify for the next round -Written Ability Test (WAT), Group Exercise (GE), and Personal Interview (PI).

items: Login with your SET ID / Email and Password

sections.heading: Selection Process After SET Cut Off

content.text: Qualifying the cutoff makes you eligible for:
Final merit list is prepared with different weightages by each institute (SET score usually carries 50% weightage).
